commands.name: resolver_unit_checks
commands.notable_output: 8 resolver cases passed: local override, explicit override, relative explicit paths, default project config, missing checkout warnings, invalid project id, actual melee local override, and project listing.

commands.name: typecheck
commands.notable_output: Root TypeScript check and dashboard ui:check completed successfully.

commands.name: smoke
commands.notable_output: Smoke returned ok=true with runId 06d505a3-82b2-4768-a9b5-ddc5a4fbb56f in the final audit pass.

commands.name: cli_help
commands.notable_output: Help includes --project and documents graph DB default as selected project graph DB, otherwise knowledge/resource_graph/graph.sqlite.

commands.name: explicit_smoke_repo_status
commands.command: STATE_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/decomp-orchestrator-explicit-status-XXXXXX); bun run orch -- --repo-root testdata/smoke_repo --state-dir "$STATE_DIR" status

commands.name: project_status
commands.notable_output: Resolved project melee to testdata/smoke_repo via local.project.json, state projects/melee/state, graph projects/melee/graph/fixture-graph.sqlite, and reported project metadata on the latest run.

commands.name: project_dry_run_init_tick_worker
commands.command: bun run orch -- --project melee --dry-run-agents init-run ...; bun run orch -- --project melee --dry-run-agents tick --run-id <run>; bun run orch -- --project melee --dry-run-agents worker --run-id <run> --worker-id validation-worker --report-type stalled_no_useful_guess
commands.notable_output: Created run 8c7ea4dc-3f01-4a62-89ef-0715f07e656c with project metadata, rendered a director prompt, leased one worker target, and rendered a worker prompt under projects/melee/state.

commands.name: kg_sources
commands.notable_output: Listed registered knowledge sources and tools.

commands.name: kg_project_status
commands.notable_output: Reported graph_db as projects/melee/graph/fixture-graph.sqlite with graph stats present.

commands.name: kg_project_rebuild_safe_subset
commands.notable_output: Rebuilt the selected project graph DB with indexed_sources [code_graph, path_facts], zero skipped sources, and stats present.
commands.skip_reason: Full-source rebuild was not required for the project-layering gate; the safe project-derived subset validates selected project repo/graph routing without refreshing global corpora.

commands.name: cli_project_graph_override_metadata
commands.command: GRAPH_DB="$PWD/knowledge/resource_graph/graph.sqlite"; STATE_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/decomp-orchestrator-graph-override-XXXXXX); bun run orch -- --project melee --state-dir "$STATE_DIR" --dry-run-agents init-run --desired-workers 1 --candidate-limit 1 --graph-db "$GRAPH_DB"
commands.notable_output: Created run c39581df-39d4-4670-814c-1afec12b3d95 and recorded the explicit graph DB override in both run.project.graphDbPath and the top-level project metadata.

commands.name: dashboard_non_listening_routes
commands.notable_output: fetchDashboardServer route probe recorded zero failures in the final audit pass with runId 81bdf0a0-fce0-4280-97cc-81f0c0569e37, including /api/config, dashboard, run details, process start/stop/drain, run init/checkpoint, PR pause/resume, PR split/QA expected failures, and report expected failure.

commands.name: prompt_project_fields
commands.notable_output: Rendered director and worker prompts contain project_id, project_kind, state_dir, graph_db, orchestrator_package, and the resource-map context-helper path.

commands.name: stale_path_scan
commands.command: rg -n -- "python3 decomp-orchestrator/|rg .*decomp-orchestrator/knowledge|jq .*decomp-orchestrator/knowledge|parent Melee|normal nested|inside a Melee|<melee>/decomp-orchestrator|checkoutRoot\(" README.md docs/00-foundation docs/10-system-design docs/20-implementation packages/agents/src packages/knowledge/src apps
commands.notable_output: No active README/docs/prompt/code hits for stale nested/parent checkout or relative decomp-orchestrator/knowledge command assumptions.

commands.name: project_runtime_ignores
commands.notable_output: projects/melee/graph, projects/melee/state, and projects/melee/local.project.json are ignored; tracked project files are visible under untracked projects/ because the whole projects/ tree is new.
